baseUrl.label: Vault URL
baseUrl.help: Base URL of the Straja Vault HTTP daemon

authToken.label: Vault Auth Token
authToken.help: Bearer token used when the vault requires paired-agent authorization. You can also provide it via STRAJA_VAULT_TOKEN.

injectMemoryInPrompt.label: Inject Memory in Prompt
injectMemoryInPrompt.help: Legacy compatibility switch. true injects memory on every prompt. Prefer Memory Prompt Injection Mode.

memoryPromptInjectionMode.label: Memory Prompt Injection Mode
memoryPromptInjectionMode.help: Choose when vault memory is injected into prompt context: off, only for new sessions, or every prompt. Default: every prompt.

debugLogPrompt.label: Debug: Log LLM Prompt
debugLogPrompt.help: Save the full LLM prompt (system + history + user message) to vault on each turn. View at /raw/_workspace/_debug/last-prompt.json
